MessageTemplate.title: MessageTemplate
MessageTemplate.description: A saved message template that the seller can use to draft rapid client responses.

category.description: The functional category of the template.

description.description: Short description of when to use this template.

content.description: The markdown or text content of the template.

usageCount.description: Number of times the template has been copied or used.

ComplianceRule.title: ComplianceRule
ComplianceRule.description: A compliance rule containing sensitive or risky words/phrases to flag during auditing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the compliance rule.

phrase.description: The specific keyword or phrase matched.

category.description: The Fiverr compliance category of the violation.

severity.description: The risk severity of the term (Low, Medium, High, Critical).

pattern.description: The RegExp string used to detect the pattern.

rewrite.description: A safe fallback or alternative phrase suggested to the user.

explanation.description: The educational explanation of why the word is flagged.

/templates/{templateId}.description: Central collection of message templates used in Fiverr Lens.

/rules/{ruleId}.description: Rules collection storing risky flagged words, patterns, and their compliant rewrites.
